# MT3D

**Summary**: A 3D transport model for simulating the movement of solutes in groundwater.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012]] applied MT3D to simulate the distribution of Total Dissolved Solids (TDS).

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The solute transport model successfully predicted TDS values between 2,450 and 3,120 mg/L for the year 1967. ([[2012-iwalewa|Iwalewa, 2012, p. 108]])
